name: wandy
description: Synara's private cross-platform Computer Use MCP server packaged as a Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Control desktop apps from Synara with the local server
interface.longDescription: Wandy packages Synara's private desktop automation runtime as a Codex plugin. It exposes desktop-control MCP tools through a local macOS app bundle or Linux / Windows native binary, with semantic accessibility paths preferred before fallback input.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the current UI state of this desktop app without stealing focus when possible
Open a new local document with keyboard shortcuts first, then type content without moving my real pointer unless required
Drive the fixture app and verify the nine computer-use tools still behave correctly
